channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Tkachuk skates with Panthers, as playoff opener at Lightning looms closer
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Matthew Tkachuk skated with the Florida Panthers in practice on Saturday, a sign that he may be ready to rejoin the lineup for Game 1 of the playoffs. The Panthers, who won the Stanley Cup last season, open Round 1 at Tampa Bay on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: World champion Alysa Liu of Richmond takes free skate as US wins World Team Trophy
item.description: Skating to “MacArthur Park” by Donna Summer, the 19-year-old Liu landed seven triple jumps for a personal-best score of 150.97 points.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: NBA playoff guide: Who plays when, how to watch, what the odds are
item.description: It's go time. The race for the Larry O'Brien Trophy is finally beginning. The 2025 NBA playoffs start Saturday with four games: Indiana-Milwaukee, Denver-Los Angeles Clippers, New York-Detroit and Los Angeles Lakers-Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lindor hits 1st walk-off homer for Mets, 250th home run of career, in 5-4 win over Cardinals
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Francisco Lindor knew. He didn't have to watch. He turned on an inside cutter from Ryan Fernandez leading off the ninth inning and sent the ball soaring into Citi Field's second deck in right field, 401 feet away. “I hit it with everything I had,” he said.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What injured ankle? Ja Morant flies around court helping Grizzlies take West's 8th seed
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Two-time All-Star Ja Morant promised a sprained right ankle wouldn't keep him out of Memphis' play-in game against Dallas with the Western Conference's last postseason berth up for grabs Friday night. Morant did more than just play.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Grizzlies beat the Mavericks 120-106 to set up a 1st-round playoff series with the Thunder
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Ja Morant shrugged off a sprained right ankle to score 22 points and add nine assists and the Memphis Grizzlies beat the Dallas Mavericks 120-106 on Friday night to advance to the NBA playoffs.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trevor Story has 2 HRs, 6 RBIs to lead Red Sox to 10-3 win over White Sox
item.description: Trevor Story went 3 for 4 with two homers and six RBIs, Hunter Dobbins pitched six strong innings, and the Boston Red Sox beat the Chicago White Sox 10-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lindblad joins Buhai atop the leaderboard in the LPGA Tour's JM Eagle LA Championship
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Ingrid Lindblad took a share of the lead into the weekend at El Caballero Country Club in only the fourth start of her rookie season on the LPGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Herro scores 30 points to lead Heat past Hawks 123-114 in OT in play-in and into NBA playoffs
item.description: Tyler Herro scored 30 points while sinking two 3-pointers in overtime and the Miami Heat regrouped after losing an early lead to beat the Atlanta Hawks 123-114 on Friday night and make NBA Play-In Tournament history.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tucker hits 2-run HR, Cubs score 6 in 8th after giving up 10 in top half to beat Diamondbacks 13-11
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Kyle Tucker had the fans on their feet, roaring and pumping their fists as he rounded the bases after hitting the go-ahead two-run homer in the eighth inning. His screaming line drive cleared the right-field wall with plenty of room to spare.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saints injured former All-Pro right tackle Ryan Ramczyk retires after missing entire 2024 season
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Saints right tackle Ryan Ramczyk, a 2017 first-round draft choice and former All-Pro who sat out all of last season because of a lingering knee injury, has announced his retirement from pro football.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The NFL Draft is one week away; 49ers, Raiders eye top-valued picks
item.description: The 2025 NFL Draft begins on April 24 and the San Francisco 49ers and the Las Vegas Raiders both have a good shot at snagging top-10 valued talent.
item.dc:creator: John Ross Ferrara, KRON4

item.title: Jackie Robinson Day and Breaking Barriers in downtown San Diego
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- April 15th annually celebrates Jackie Robinson Day around Major League Baseball. Also, with the San Diego Padres in tow and on board with 2025 Breaking Barriers.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Sky select Ajsa Sivka, Hailey Van Lith in WNBA Draft
item.description: The Chicago Sky selected Slovenian stretch four Ajsa Sivka and TCU point guard Hailey Van Lith with their top two picks in the WNBA draft to address their need for perimeter shooting and to bolster their rebounding efforts.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: Roars for Rory. The famous sound of Sunday at the Masters Tournament could be for Rory McIlroy (-12) this year.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, WGN 9

item.title: Connor stars as Jets clinch Central Division title with shootout victory over Blackhawks
item.description: Kyle Connor and Cole Perfetti scored in the shootout, and the Winnipeg Jets clinched the franchise’s first Central Division title and the No. 1 seed for the Western Conference playoffs with a wild 5-4 victory over the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
